description: The ToLower node takes in a character or string and outputs it as lowercase. This node takes into account the local user's CultureInfo.

notes.title: See also
notes.text:
* ToUpper to turn strings or characters uppercase.
* Microsoft documentation for the ``String.ToLower() method``, which is used internally.

ProtoFlux:Strings:Characters
ProtoFlux:Strings:Formatting
